title: Schoenus bolusii
taxonomy: Schoenus bolusii is classified as a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the sedge family and includes over 5,000 species. The genus Schoenus is further divided into several sections, with Schoenus bolusii being part of the section Schoenus. The plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Cyperaceae family.
